name: Ventbox
one_liner: Architecturally-anonymous employee feedback platform — employees initiate unfiltered workplace feedback; HR sees AI-categorized sentiment without ever knowing who said what. Flat-rate, not per-seat.
notes: Onboarded into factory 2026-05-19. LIVE at https://ventbox.co (verified 2026-06-07) — pivoted from generic anonymous-vent to B2B HR/employee-feedback wedge: 60s setup, anonymous admin invites, company-domain restriction, AI sentiment analysis, pricing free->$49/mo flat-rate. Codebase at ~/Claude/Ventbox App Clone/. Listed in README 'Products built with Hamzaish'. Backfill analytics IDs + validation/retention evidence.

validation.state: 5 conversations with HR leads/founders at 10-100-person companies (source: notes)

launch.state: analytics live (PostHog/GA IDs filled in config) + 10 measured signups (source: PostHog)

traction.state: 3 paying orgs at $49/mo OR flattening weekly-active-orgs curve (source: Stripe + PostHog)

pmf.state: Sean Ellis >=40% AND retention curve flattens
